attributes_by_aphia_id.description: Get a list of attributes for a given AphiaID

attribute_values_by_category_id.description: Get list values that are grouped by an CateogryID

aphia_ids_by_attribute_key_id.description: Get a list of AphiaID's (max 50) with attribute tree for a given attribute definition ID

distributions_by_aphia_id.description: Get all distributions for a given AphiaID

external_id_by_aphia_id.description: Get any external identifier(s) for a given AphiaID

aphia_record_by_external_id.description: Get the Aphia Record for a given external identifier

sources_by_aphia_id.description: Get one or more sources/references including links, for one AphiaID

children_by_aphia_id.description: Get the direct children (max. 50) for a given AphiaID

classification_by_aphia_id.description: Get the complete classification for one taxon. This also includes any sub or super ranks.

aphia_id_by_name.description: Get the AphiaID for a given name.

name_by_aphia_id.description: Get the name for a given AphiaID

record_by_aphia_id.description: Get the complete AphiaRecord for a given AphiaID

record_full_by_aphia_id.description: Get the complete AphiaFullRecord for a given AphiaID

records_by_aphia_ids.description: Get an AphiaRecord for multiple AphiaIDs in one go (max: 50)

records_by_date.description: Lists all AphiaRecords (taxa) that have their last edit action (modified or added) during the specified period

records_by_match_names.description: Try to find AphiaRecords using the TAXAMATCH fuzzy matching algorithm by Tony Rees

records_by_name.description: Get one or more matching (max. 50) AphiaRecords for a given name

records_by_names.description: For each given scientific name, try to find one or more AphiaRecords

records_by_taxon_rank_id.description: Get the AphiaRecords for a given taxonRankID (max 50)

synonyms_by_aphia_id.description: Get all synonyms for a given AphiaID

taxon_ranks_by_id.description: Get taxonomic ranks by their identifier

taxon_ranks_by_name.description: Get taxonomic ranks by their name

records_by_vernacular.description: Get one or more Aphia Records (max. 50) for a given vernacular

vernaculars_by_aphia_id.description: Get all vernaculars for a given AphiaID

ID.description: Numeric identifier for various WoRMS entities

scientificnames.description: Multiple scientific names separated by pipe (|)

startdate.description: Start date for record filtering (format: yyyy-mm-dd)

enddate.description: End date for record filtering (format: yyyy-mm-dd)

marine_only.description: Flag to restrict results to marine taxa only

like.description: Flag to use SQL LIKE matching instead of exact matching

fuzzy.description: Flag to use fuzzy matching algorithms
